TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Keith_Appling, title = Keith_Appling, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Keith_Appling} }

S.FORM: Keith Appling sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 2, Keith Appling, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)

Keith Appling sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1992, ryax sa tay 13 nqu tay 2, Keith Appling, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players)
S.PHON: keitħ appliŋ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, keitħ appliŋ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ)
